title: cordia obtusiloba
intro: Cordia obtusiloba, also known as the Mexican cordia or yellow bird of paradise, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and distinctive shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cordia obtusiloba include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
